description_long: This weathered stone sculpture depicts a dramatic scene with two human figures. The dominant figure stands over a fallen figure, raising an arm that holds a coiled object, possibly a whip or rope, suggesting a moment of action or struggle. The standing figure is muscular and dynamic, with detailed anatomical features and a sense of movement. The fallen figure lies on its back, partially twisted, with one arm outstretched and the head turned to the side. The surface of the sculpture is rough and mottled, with visible signs of aging, such as lichen or moss growth and erosion. The entire composition rests on a rectangular plinth, anchoring the figures to the ground.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of two human figures in a dramatic, dynamic pose, with one standing over the other and raising a coiled object. The surface is rough and aged, with detailed anatomy and expressive movement.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the standing figure's face, raised arm with coiled object, and the full body of the fallen figure beneath.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the muscular back and side of the standing figure, with the fallen figure partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the standing figure and the outstretched arm of the fallen figure, with both figures' postures clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the side and back of the standing figure, with the fallen figure's head and torso visible on the ground.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures in a dramatic struggle
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
